title: Proclamation No. 475, s. 1965
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 475

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF THE DAVAO PENAL COLONY RESERVATION A CERTAIN PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC LAND EMBRACED THEREIN, SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STO. TOMAS (FORMERLY MUNICIPALITY OF PANABO), PROVINCE OF DAVAO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO, AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN TO DISPOSITION UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF THE PUBLIC LAND ACT.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the operation of the Davao Penal Colony Reservation a certain parcel of the land embraced therein situated in the Municipality of Sto. Tomas (formerly Municipality of Panabo), Province of Davao, Island of Mindanao, and declare the same open to disposition under the provisions of the Public Land Act, which parcel of land is more particularly described as follows:

A parcel of land (portions of Lots 4710, Cad. 276 and 1370, Cad. 284) situated in the Barrios of Balangonan and Bobongan, Municipality of Santos Tomas, Province of Davao, Island of Mindanao. Bounded on the North by the Tuganay River; on the East by DECO and portion of NAFCO; on the South by the Davao Penal Colony Reservation and the Panabo Hemp Company; on the West by the NARRA Settlement (Pls-70). Beginning at a point marked 1 on the Plan being due East, 1,618.88 meters from M.B.M. No. 18, Tagum Cad. 276—

thence Due North, 375.00 meters to point 2; thence N. 65 deg. 00 min. E., 50.00 meters to point 3; thence Due North, 65.00 meters to point 4; thence N. 64 deg. 00 min. W., 28.00 meters to point 5; thence N. 45 deg. 00 min. E., 60.00 meters to point 6; thence S. 45 deg. 00 min. E., 50.00 meters to point 7; thence N. 30 deg. 00 min. E., 60.00 meters to point 8; thence N. 60 deg. 00 min. E., 300.00 meters to point 9; thence S. 4 deg. 00 min. W., 140.00 meters to point 10; thence S. 13 deg. 00 min. E., 100.00 meters to point 11; thence N.,80 deg. 00 min. E., 240.00 meters to point 12; thence N. 20 deg. 00 min. W., 100.00 meters to point 13; thence N. 44 deg. 00 min. E., 400.00 meters to point 14; thence Due North, 1,500.00 meters to point 15; thence N. 60 deg. 00 min. E., 480.00 meters to point 16; thence Due North, 2,400.00 meters to point 17; thence following the south bank of Tuganay River, in a general easterly direction, 2,860 meters to point 28; thence S. 7 deg. 00 mitt. E,, 345.00 meters to point 29; thence S. 30 deg. 53 min. E., 400.00 meters to point 30; thence S. 59 deg. 03 min. W., 100.00 meters to point 31; thence Due South, 1,300.00 meters to point 32; thence Due West, 680.00 meters to point 33; thence Due South, 1,980.00 meters to point 34; thence Due East, 200.00 meters to point 35; thence Due South, 1,000.00 meters to point 36; thence Due West, 3,350.00 meters to point of beginning marked 1 containing an approximate area of 1,200 hectares.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 15th day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-five.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President: SALVADOR L. MARIÑO Acting Executive Secretary

Source : University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
